resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for invoice currency lock after confirmation.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for invoice currency lock after confirmation.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Invoice currency lock after confirmation', but the evidence provided does not include any information regarding the currency lock mechanism or confirmation process. While there are successful bookings in USD, there is no evidence indicating that the currency was locked post-confirmation or any details about the conversion rate being maintained. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence of currency lock after confirmation.
No details on how the currency is maintained post-confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the currency lock after confirmation.
